rule_text: gdpr_material(S) :- processing(S), processing_concerns(S, D), personal_data(D), automated_means(S).
gdpr_material(S) :- processing(S), processing_concerns(S, D), personal_data(D), manual_processing(S), filing_system(S).
gdpr_material(S) :- processing(S), processing_concerns(S, D), personal_data(D), manual_processing(S), intended_to_form_part_of_filing_system(S).
led_law_enforcement_processing(S) :- processing(S), performs_processing(A, S), competent_authority(A), law_enforcement_purpose(S).
competent_authority_other_purpose_processing(S) :- processing(S), performs_processing(A, S), competent_authority(A), within_union_law(S), non_led_task(S).

may_restrict_gdpr_right_or_obligation(S, R) :- private_body_processing(S), gdpr_applies_to_processing(S), legislative_restriction_measure(S, R), necessary_and_proportionate_restriction(S), safeguards_specific_important_interest(S).
gdpr_territorial_link(A, S) :- controller(A, S), establishment_in_union(A), processing_in_context_of_establishment(S, A).
gdpr_territorial_link(A, S) :- processor(A, S), establishment_in_union(A), processing_in_context_of_establishment(S, A).
monitors_behaviour_in_eu(A, S) :- tracks_natural_persons_on_internet(A, S), profiling_used_for_decisions(A, S), behaviour_takes_place_in_eu(S).
monitors_behaviour_in_eu(A, S) :- tracks_natural_persons_on_internet(A, S), profiling_used_to_analyse_or_predict(A, S), behaviour_takes_place_in_eu(S).
personal_data(D) :- concerns(D, A), natural_person(A), identified_person(A, D).
personal_data(D) :- concerns(D, A), natural_person(A), identifiable_person(A, D).
identifiable_person(A, D) :- concerns(D, A), reasonably_likely_means_to_identify(D, A).
supports_data_protection_obligations(A, S) :- controller(A, S), pseudonymisation_measure(M, S).
supports_data_protection_obligations(A, S) :- processor(A, S), pseudonymisation_measure(M, S).
effective_pseudonymisation(S, D) :- pseudonymisation_applied(S, D), additional_information_kept_separately(D), technical_organisational_measures(S), authorised_persons_indicated(S).
identifiable_person(A, D) :- online_identifier(D), concerns(D, A), natural_person(A), combined_with_unique_identifier(D).
profiling_trace(D, A) :- online_identifier(D), concerns(D, A), natural_person(A), server_received_information(D).
profile_created(A, S) :- profiling_trace(D, A), processing_concerns(S, D).

public_authority_particular_inquiry_exception(A, S) :- public_authority(A), disclosed_to(A, S), legal_obligation_disclosure(S), official_mission(A, S), necessary_for_particular_inquiry(S), general_interest_inquiry(S).
gdpr_material(S) :- processing(S), processing_concerns(S, D), personal_data(D), automated_means(S).
gdpr_material(S) :- processing(S), processing_concerns(S, D), personal_data(D), filing_system(S).
gdpr_territorial_link(A, S) :- controller(A, S), established_in(A, "eu"), processing_in_context_of_establishment(S, A).
gdpr_territorial_link(A, S) :- processor(A, S), established_in(A, "eu"), processing_in_context_of_establishment(S, A).
gdpr_territorial_link(A, S) :- controller(A, S), data_subjects_in_eu_targeted(S, A).
gdpr_territorial_link(A, S) :- processor(A, S), data_subjects_in_eu_targeted(S, A).
gdpr_territorial_link(A, S) :- controller(A, S), monitors_behaviour_in_eu(A, S).
gdpr_territorial_link(A, S) :- processor(A, S), monitors_behaviour_in_eu(A, S).
personal_data(X) :- concerns(X, A), natural_person(A), identifies(X, A).
personal_data(D) :- concerns(D, A), natural_person(A), identifies(D, A).
valid_consent(A, S) :- freely_given_consent(A, S), specific_consent(A, S), informed_consent(A, S), unambiguous_consent(A, S), affirmative_action(A, S).
no_obligation(A, S, "GDPR_A11.1_maintain_acquire_or_process_additional_identification_info") :- applies_via_actor(S, T, "gdpr", A), controller(A, S), identification_not_required_for_purposes(S).

obligation(A, S, "GDPR_A11.2_inform_data_subject_cannot_identify_if_possible") :- applies_via_actor(S, T, "gdpr", A), controller(A, S), not_in_position_to_identify_data_subject(S), informing_data_subject_possible(S).
obligation(A, S, "GDPR_A27.1_designate_representative_in_union") :- applies_via_actor(S, T, "gdpr", A), gdpr_art3_2_applies(A, S),!gdpr_representative_obligation_exempt(A, S).
no_additional_obligations(A, S, "GDPR_A95") :- eprivacy_lex_specialis(S), provision_trigger("GDPR_A95", A, S).
ai_act_territorial_link(A, X) :- provider(A, X), established_in(A, "third_country"), output_used_in_eu(X).
ai_act_territorial_link(A, X) :- deployer(A, X), established_in(A, "third_country"), output_used_in_eu(X).
ai_act_territorial_link(A, S) :- provider(A, S), places_on_eu_market(A, S).
ai_act_territorial_link(A, S) :- provider(A, S), puts_into_service_in_eu(A, S).
ai_act_territorial_link(A, S) :- importer(A, S), places_on_eu_market(A, S).
ai_act_territorial_link(A, X) :- manufacturer(A, X), places_on_eu_market_with_product(A, X).
ai_act_territorial_link(A, X) :- manufacturer(A, X), puts_into_service_in_eu(A, X).
provider(A, X) :- develops_ai_system(A, X), places_on_market(A, X).
provider(A, X) :- develops_ai_system(A, X), puts_into_service(A, X).
provider(A, X) :- has_ai_system_developed(A, X), places_on_market_under_own_name(A, X).
distributor(A, X) :- supply_chain_actor(A, X), makes_available_on_union_market(A, X),!provider(A, X),!importer(A, X).
prohibition(A, X, "AIAct_A5.1_prohibited_ai_practice") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), prohibited_practice(X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A5.3_prior_authorisation_for_permitted_realtime_rbi") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), has_feature(X, "realtime_remote_biometric_id_public"), rbi_law_enforcement_exception(X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A5.4_notify_authorities_for_permitted_realtime_rbi") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), has_feature(X, "realtime_remote_biometric_id_public"), rbi_law_enforcement_exception(X).
high_risk_ai(X) :- ai_system(X), safety_component_of(X, Y), annex_i_legislation(L), subject_to_third_party_assessment(Y, L).

not_high_risk_ai(X) :- ai_system(X), annex_iii_use_case(U), used_in(X, U), no_significant_risk_to_health_safety_fundamental_rights(X), not_high_risk_derogation_factor(X, F),!profiling_of_natural_persons(X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A6.4_document_non_high_risk_assessment") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), ai_system(X), used_in(X, U), annex_iii_use_case(U), provider_claims_not_high_risk(A, X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A6.4_register_under_article_49_if_claiming_not_high_risk") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), ai_system(X), used_in(X, U), annex_iii_use_case(U), provider_claims_not_high_risk(A, X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.1_inform_natural_person_ai_interaction") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), intended_to_interact_directly_with_natural_persons(X),!interaction_obviously_ai(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.2_mark_synthetic_outputs_machine_readable") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), generates_synthetic_content(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.3_inform_exposed_persons_emotion_recognition") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), emotion_recognition_system(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.3_inform_exposed_persons_biometric_categorisation") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), biometric_categorisation_system(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.4_disclose_deep_fake_content") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), deep_fake_generation_or_manipulation(X),!deep_fake_disclosure_exempt(X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.4_disclose_ai_generated_public_interest_text") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), generated_text_public_interest(X),!human_review_or_editorial_control(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A52.1_notify_commission_within_two_weeks") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), gpai_model(X), gpai_high_impact_capability(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A52.1_include_information_demonstrating_requirement_met") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), gpai_model(X), gpai_high_impact_capability(X).
gdpr_art3_2_applies(A, S) :- controller(A, S), data_subjects_in_eu_targeted(S, A).
gdpr_art3_2_applies(A, S) :- processor(A, S), data_subjects_in_eu_targeted(S, A).
gdpr_art3_2_applies(A, S) :- controller(A, S), monitors_behaviour_in_eu(A, S).
gdpr_art3_2_applies(A, S) :- processor(A, S), monitors_behaviour_in_eu(A, S).
prohibition(A, S, "GDPR_A9.1_process_special_category_data") :- applies_via_actor(S, T, "gdpr", A), processing_concerns(S, D), special_category_data(D),!gdpr_art9_exception(S).

prohibition(A, S, "GDPR_A10_process_criminal_offence_data_without_authority_or_law") :- applies_via_actor(S, T, "gdpr", A), processing_concerns(S, D), criminal_offence_data(D),!official_authority_control(S),!law_authorises_criminal_data_processing(S).
no_obligation(A, S, "GDPR_A11.1_maintain_acquire_or_process_additional_identification_info") :- applies_via_actor(S, T, "gdpr", A), controller(A, S), identification_not_required_for_purposes(S).

obligation(A, S, "GDPR_A11.2_inform_data_subject_cannot_identify_if_possible") :- applies_via_actor(S, T, "gdpr", A), controller(A, S), not_in_position_to_identify_data_subject(S), informing_data_subject_possible(S).
obligation(A, S, "GDPR_A27.1_designate_representative_in_union") :- applies_via_actor(S, T, "gdpr", A), gdpr_art3_2_applies(A, S),!gdpr_representative_obligation_exempt(A, S).
prohibition(A, X, "AIAct_A5.1_prohibited_ai_practice") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), prohibited_practice(X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A5.3_prior_authorisation_for_permitted_realtime_rbi") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), has_feature(X, "realtime_remote_biometric_id_public"), rbi_law_enforcement_exception(X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A5.4_notify_authorities_for_permitted_realtime_rbi") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), has_feature(X, "realtime_remote_biometric_id_public"), rbi_law_enforcement_exception(X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A6.4_document_non_high_risk_assessment") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), ai_system(X), used_in(X, U), annex_iii_use_case(U), provider_claims_not_high_risk(A, X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A6.4_register_under_article_49_if_claiming_not_high_risk") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), ai_system(X), used_in(X, U), annex_iii_use_case(U), provider_claims_not_high_risk(A, X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.1_inform_natural_person_ai_interaction") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), intended_to_interact_directly_with_natural_persons(X),!interaction_obviously_ai(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.2_mark_synthetic_outputs_machine_readable") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), generates_synthetic_content(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.3_inform_exposed_persons_emotion_recognition") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), emotion_recognition_system(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.3_inform_exposed_persons_biometric_categorisation") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), biometric_categorisation_system(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.4_disclose_deep_fake_content") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), deep_fake_generation_or_manipulation(X),!deep_fake_disclosure_exempt(X).

obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A50.4_disclose_ai_generated_public_interest_text") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), deployer(A, X), generated_text_public_interest(X),!human_review_or_editorial_control(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A52.1_notify_commission_within_two_weeks") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), gpai_model(X), gpai_high_impact_capability(X).
obligation(A, X, "AIAct_A52.1_include_information_demonstrating_requirement_met") :- applies_via_actor(X, T, "ai_act", A), provider(A, X), gpai_model(X), gpai_high_impact_capability(X).
applies(S, T, R) :- in_force(R, T), regulation_territorial_link(R, A, S), regulation_material(R, S), !regulation_excluded(R, S).
applies_via_actor(S, T, R, A) :- in_force(R, T), regulation_territorial_link(R, A, S), regulation_material(R, S), !regulation_excluded(R, S).
